title: Alsinella trinervis
taxonomy: Alsinella trinervis belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. It is a flowering plant species that is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States. Alsinella trinervis is further classified as a member of the genus Alsinella, which is a small group of plants known for their unique characteristics. This species is also known as Three-veined Skyrocket or Three-veined Phlox. Alsinella trinervis is a rare and endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
